title: AdventureWorld
description: Scene description for Adventure World Builder. Renders a sparse editable world plus a separate gameLayer for adventure markers and objectives. Only emit cells that differ from the defaults; the renderer fills the rest with grass.

gridSize.description: Optional editable board size. Defaults to 8 when omitted.

cells.description: Sparse list of non-default cells on the current grid. x/z must be inside the active grid size. Each (x,z) should appear at most once.

gameLayer.description: Adventure authoring data kept separate from terrain and object cells.

cameraMode.description: Optional preferred camera. Defaults to current camera if omitted.

toolId.description: Optional tool to leave selected after load. Ignored if unknown.

objective.description: Active board objective. Defaults to defeat_villain.

terrain.description: Tile material. Water should not host object kinds except bridge. Crop-type kinds imply terrain='dirt'.

kind.description: Object placed on the cell, or null for none. House uses floors and optional buildingType. Fence uses fenceSide. Bridge is the only kind intended for water.

floors.description: Object stack/intensity count. For houses it means floors. For props/crops it means denser or more detailed variants.

terrainFloors.description: Ground height stack for the terrain layer only.

buildingType.description: Forced single-cell house variant. null uses cluster logic. turret supports castle-style tower cells.

fenceSide.description: For fences only. n/s/e/w place one fence leaf on that tile edge. center-x and center-z place a centre-line fence.
